title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
